steps.title: Use identical equations
steps.content: A system has infinitely many solutions when both equations represent the same line. Therefore, the second equation must have the same slope and the same $y$-intercept.

steps.title: Identify the intercept
steps.content:
The given equation is
$$y=\frac{3}{8}x+4$$
For $y=mx+b$ to be identical, $b$ must equal the same intercept. The answer is D.
